trigger: 在马球场休息室装作胃病发作，下跪求情以博取沈词同情。

appearance_delta.face: 面色惨白，眉头微蹙，眼角挂着摇摇欲坠的泪珠，显得极其痛苦无助
appearance_delta.body: 佝偻着身子，双手捂住胃部，呈现出随时会晕倒的柔弱姿态
appearance_delta.hair: 发髻略微松散，几缕碎发贴在苍白的脸颊上
appearance_delta.distinguishing_features: 极具欺骗性的无辜且痛苦的眼神，眼眶通红

costume_override.outfit: 月白色轻纱长裙，因下跪而裙摆铺开，显得单薄可怜

visual_reference: A fragile young ancient Chinese woman kneeling on the floor, clutching her stomach, pale face, tearful eyes with red rims, pitiful expression, wearing a thin moon-white gauze dress, slightly messy hair, cinematic lighting, 8k.
